m := 6;
n := 2;
g := 9;
R<u,v>:=PolynomialRing(Rationals(),2);
X := 729*u^3*v^10 + (3645*u^4 + 3645*u^3)*v^9 + (81*u^7 + 7290*u^5 + 15714*u^4 + 7290*u^3 + 81*u)*v^8 + (243*u^8 + 243*u^7 + 7506*u^6 + 26406*u^5 + 26406*u^4 + 7074*u^3 + 405*u^2 + 405*u)*v^7 + (243*u^9 + 567*u^8 + 4536*u^7 + 22032*u^6 + 35910*u^5 + 20520*u^4 + 3591*u^3 + 1701*u^2 + 810*u)*v^6 + (93*u^10 + 405*u^9 + 1782*u^8 + 9714*u^7 + 22842*u^6 + 20898*u^5 + 6243*u^4 + 2187*u^3 + 2754*u^2 + 798*u)*v^5 - (u^12 - 12*u^11 - 93*u^10 - 405*u^9 - 2175*u^8 - 6792*u^7 - 8704*u^6 - 3177*u^5 - 180*u^4 - 2565*u^3 - 2058*u^2 - 357*u + 1)*v^4 + (4*u^11 + 27*u^10 + 183*u^9 + 740*u^8 + 1148*u^7 - 43*u^6 - 1067*u^5 + 531*u^4 + 1575*u^3 + 581*u^2 + 5*u - 4)*v^3 - (u^10 + 4*u^9 + 48*u^8 + 245*u^7 + 423*u^6 + 55*u^5 - 443*u^4 - 249*u^3 + 81*u^2 + 60*u + 6)*v^2 - (u^8 - 3*u^7 - 35*u^6 - 71*u^5 - 19*u^4 + 73*u^3 + 72*u^2 + 24*u + 4)*v - u^6 - 6*u^5 - 14*u^4 - 16*u^3 - 10*u^2 - 4*u - 1;
t := (v+1)*(u+v)/u;
x := v*(u+v)*(u+v+1)/(u^2);
E := [2-t,t-t^2,t-t^2,0,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [x];
